events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON only. Need assess scenario: hot work in production floor, combustibles within radius uncovered, work actively in progress. Need identify hazards severity immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Combustibles within radius uncovered during hot work is high fire risk, could be critical if ignition imminent. But standard severity maybe high. Need decide. NFPA 51B requires 35 ft radius clear of combustibles or covered/shielded. OSHA 1926 Subpart J requires fire prevention and protection, no exposure to combustible materials, fire watch. Immediate controls: stop hot work, remove or cover combustibles, wet down, shield with fire-resistant blankets, establish fire watch with extinguisher, hot work permit, inspect area, train. Component conditions: non-compliant (work practice), installed-defective? Not component. Could use non-compliant. Work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says sound_source source when asked; can be empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. confidence 1.0. findings list. actions list. references. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Combustible materials are located within the hot-work hazard radius and are left uncovered/unprotected.",
    "Hot work is proceeding without adequate ignition-source control or a proper fire-prevention zone.",
    "No evidence of a compliant hot-work permit, fire watch, or shielding/covering of combustibles."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop hot work in the affected area.",
    "Remove all combustibles from the hot-work radius, or cover/shield them with fire-resistant blankets or guards.",
    "Wet down combustible surfaces where removal or covering is not feasible.",
    "Post a trained fire watch with suitable portable fire extinguishers for the duration of work and the required cool-down period.",
    "Issue and review a hot-work permit before restarting; verify supervisor sign-off and area inspection.",
    "Re-inspect the work zone and adjacent areas for hidden combustibles before resuming."
  ],
  "rationale": "NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require combustibles within the hot-work zone to be removed, relocated, or protected, and a fire watch to be maintained. Active hot work with uncovered combustibles in the radius creates an imminent fire hazard, so the work fails inspection until controls are implemented.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart J"
  ]
}
